USER.TITLE: Users
USER.DESCRIPTION: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions

CATEGORY.TITLE: Categories
CATEGORY.DESCRIPTION: Create, edit, and remove catalog categories
CATEGORY.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
CATEGORY.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: The main name and description match the English version. The table shows the base name only.
CATEGORY.IMAGE_HINT: JPEG, PNG, WebP up to 5 MB
CATEGORY.NAME: Name
CATEGORY.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted or soft-deleted depending on linked products.

ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.TITLE: Attribute groups
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.DESCRIPTION: Create, edit, and remove groups of product attributes (e.g. General, Dimensions).
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.EMPTY: No attribute groups yet. Click “Add group”.
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: The main name and description match the English version. The table shows the base name and slug.
ATTRIBUTE_GROUP.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted. Linked attributes may be removed or soft-deleted depending on usage.

PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.TITLE: Product attributes
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.DESCRIPTION: Define attributes (name, type, filters) within attribute groups. Values per product come later.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.EMPTY: No attributes yet. Create at least one attribute group, then add an attribute.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.NO_GROUPS_HINT: Create an attribute group first — attributes must belong to a group.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: English is the base name stored on the attribute; Ukrainian is a translation.
PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTE.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted or soft-deleted if used by products.

BRAND.TITLE: Brands
BRAND.DESCRIPTION: Create, edit, and remove catalog brands
BRAND.SEARCH_EMPTY: No matches for this search. Try different keywords.
BRAND.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: The main name and description match the English version. The table shows the base name only.
BRAND.LOGO_HINT: JPEG, PNG, WebP up to 5 MB
BRAND.DELETE_DESC: “{{name}}” will be deleted or soft-deleted depending on linked products.

PROMOTION.TITLE: Promotions & discounts
PROMOTION.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage promotions: product or cart level, conditions, discount, validity, coupons.
PROMOTION.LOAD_ERROR: Could not load the promotions list. Please refresh the page or try again later.
PROMOTION.TRANSLATIONS_HINT: Base name and description (EN) follow the same pattern as categories; add Ukrainian translation. The table shows the base name.
PROMOTION.IMAGE_HINT: JPEG, PNG, WebP up to 5 MB
PROMOTION.DATES_ORDER_ERROR: Start date must be before end date.
PROMOTION.PRODUCT_CONDITIONS_HINT: Search by name or paste GUIDs in the advanced section. Empty restrictions mean all products that match the promotion.
PROMOTION.CART_CONDITIONS_HINT: Minimum total and quantity; optionally restrict products or categories by name search or GUIDs.
PROMOTION.PICKER_SEARCH_HINT: At least 2 characters. Pick from the list — the ID is added automatically.

TASKS_PAGE.TITLE: Tasks
TASKS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Tasks for admins and moderators: assign, complete, or cancel.
TASKS_PAGE.EMPTY: No tasks match the selected filters.

SUBSCRIPTIONS_PAGE.TITLE: Newsletter subscribers
SUBSCRIPTIONS_PAGE.DESCRIPTION: Active newsletter subscriptions. Search by email or name.

FOOTER.NEWSLETTER_SUCCESS: Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter!
FOOTER.NEWSLETTER_ERROR: Could not subscribe. Please try again later.

NEWSLETTER.UNSUBSCRIBE_MISSING_TOKEN_DESC: Unsubscribe requires a valid token from the email link.

HOME.DESCRIPTION: A clean foundation for your Angular project.

CONTACTS.SUBTITLE: A music instruments store for professionals and beginners
CONTACTS.WHO_WE_ARE_TEXT: We are a team passionate about music, helping you find the best instruments.
CONTACTS.MISSION_TEXT: To provide quality instruments and service for every musician.
CONTACTS.SUCCESS_EMAIL: Thank you! We have received your message. Expect a reply at the email address you provided.
CONTACTS.ERROR_GENERIC: We could not send your message. Please try again later.
CONTACTS.TITLE: Contact Us
CONTACTS.NAME: Name
CONTACTS.SUBJECT: Subject
CONTACTS.MAXLENGTH_SUBJECT: Subject must be at most 200 characters

AUTH.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be not shorter than {min} characters
AUTH.TERMS_REQUIRED: You must agree to the terms
AUTH.REGISTRATION_SUCCESS: Registration successful! Please check your email for confirmation.
AUTH.EMAIL_UNCONFIRMED_DESC: Please check your email for confirmation.
AUTH.EMAIL_NOT_SENT: Email not sent, please contact support
AUTH.2FA_DESC_EMAIL: We sent a verification code to your email address.
AUTH.2FA_DESC_SMS: We sent a verification code to your phone number.
AUTH.2FA_DESC_TOTP: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
AUTH.FORGOT_PASSWORD_REQUEST_DESC: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link.
AUTH.FORGOT_PASSWORD_SENT_DESC: Check your inbox and follow the link in the email.
AUTH.FORGOT_PASSWORD_DESC: Enter a new password for your account.
AUTH.EMAIL_CONFIRMED_DESC: Your email has been successfully confirmed. You can now log in.
AUTH.EMAIL_CONFIRMATION_FAILED_DESC: The link is invalid or has expired. Try registering again or contact support.
AUTH.PASSWORD_RESET_DONE_DESC: Your password has been successfully changed. You can now log in with the new password.
AUTH.CHANGE_PASSWORD_DESC: Enter a new password for your account.
AUTH.CHANGE_PASSWORD_SUCCESS_DESC: Your password has been successfully updated.
AUTH.CHANGE_PASSWORD_ERROR_DESC: Could not change your password. Please try again or contact support.
AUTH.BACKUP_CODES_DESC: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can be used only once to log in if you lose access to your 2FA method.
AUTH.BACKUP_LOGIN_DESC: Enter one of your backup codes to log in.
AUTH.SOCIAL_LOGIN_ERROR_DESC: Failed to log in with social media. Try again or log in with email.

PROFILE.CHANGE_PASSWORD_DESC: Change your password to keep your account secure
PROFILE.DELETE_ACCOUNT_DESC: Once deleted, your account cannot be recovered. All your data will be permanently removed.
PROFILE.NOT_LOGGED_IN: Please log in to view your profile
PROFILE.AVATAR_TOO_LARGE: File size must not exceed 5 MB

2FA_SETUP.TITLE: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication
2FA_SETUP.METHOD_EMAIL_DESC: A code will be sent to your email address
2FA_SETUP.METHOD_SMS_DESC: A code will be sent to the phone number in your profile
2FA_SETUP.TOTP_SCAN_DESC: Scan the QR code in your authenticator app, or enter the secret manually
2FA_SETUP.TOTP_ENTER_CODE: Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm

2FA_MANAGE.TITLE: Manage Two-Factor Authentication
2FA_MANAGE.BACKUP_CODES_DESC: View your backup codes for logging in if you lose access
2FA_MANAGE.SWITCH_METHOD_DESC: Change from the current method to a different one
2FA_MANAGE.DISABLE_DESC: Removing two-factor authentication will reduce account security

LOGIN_ERROR: Login and password combination not found
PROMOTION_SLUG_EXISTS: Promotion with this slug already exists
REGISTER_ERROR: Registration failed, please try again later
USER_NOT_FOUND: Login and password combination not found

DELIVERY.TITLE: Payment & Delivery
DELIVERY.SUBTITLE: Choose the convenient delivery and payment method for your order

SELF_PICKUP.TITLE: Self Pickup (Chernivtsi)
SELF_PICKUP.DESCRIPTION: You can pick up your order at our office.
SELF_PICKUP.PAYMENT_3: LiqPay or bank transfer to FOP account

COURIER.TITLE: Courier Delivery (Chernivtsi)
COURIER.DESCRIPTION: Orders over 4000 UAH are delivered free of charge. Our staff will deliver to your address, check the package, and provide documents.

NOVA_BRANCH.TITLE: Nova Poshta (to branch)
NOVA_BRANCH.DESCRIPTION: Payment options: Privat24, LiqPay, afterpayment, or bank transfer. Delivery according to carrier schedule.

NOVA_ADDRESS.TITLE: Nova Poshta (to address)
NOVA_ADDRESS.DESCRIPTION: Delivery cost is determined by carrier. Estimated delivery: 2–4 days. Payment via selected method.

DELIVERY.CHECK_TEXT: Check the completeness, packaging, and integrity of the goods upon receipt.

PAYMENT.BANK: Bank transfer to FOP account (no commission)

DELIVERY.IMPORTANT_TEXT: After leaving the pickup point or releasing the courier, you agree the goods were delivered correctly. Any claims made afterward will not be accepted.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Us
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Leveleo Chernivtsi — next-generation music hypermarket
ABOUT.INTRO_TEXT: Leveleo Chernivtsi is a modern music hypermarket offering a wide range of musical instruments, sound, lighting, and studio equipment across Ukraine. Thanks to a professional team, high-quality products, and advanced technologies, our store holds a leading position in the market.
ABOUT.CATALOG_TEXT: Our catalog includes a wide variety of musical instruments and equipment: from rare instruments to advanced professional studio solutions, meeting the needs of any customer.
ABOUT.PRICING_TEXT: We offer products for both beginners and professionals. Regular sales and promotions allow customers to purchase high-quality equipment at the best prices.
ABOUT.SUPPORT_TEXT: Our technical support team is always ready to assist. You can contact us anytime via phone or website for professional advice.
ADVANTAGES: Warranty and certified quality for all products
Fast and secure delivery across Ukraine
Return and exchange according to legislation
ABOUT.MISSION_TEXT: We aim to deliver emotions through music by providing quality service, reliable instruments, and a comfortable shopping experience.

RETURNS.TITLE: Returns & Exchange
RETURNS.INTRO: According to Ukrainian consumer protection law, you can return goods within 14 days if all conditions are met.
RETURNS.GOOD_QUALITY_NOTE: The item must be in new condition without scratches or signs of use.
RETURNS.BAD_QUALITY_TEXT: If defects are found during warranty period, you may request:
RETURNS.DELIVERY_TEXT: Shipping cost is paid by customer according to carrier тарифs.
IMPORTANT_LIST: Only unused items can be returned
Refund goes to original payment method
Refund time — up to 10 business days
RETURNS.FINAL_NOTE: Only unused items without damage are accepted. Otherwise return may be rejected.

TERMS.TITLE: Terms of Use
TERMS.SUBTITLE: Please read the rules for using the Leveleo online store
TERMS.WARNING: Attention! Please read these terms before using the website. If you disagree — do not use the site.
TERMS.SECTION_1_TEXT: Leveleo provides access to browse and purchase products.
TERMS.SECTION_2_3: We are not liable for damages
TERMS.SECTION_3_2: User is responsible for account security
TERMS.SECTION_6_TEXT: We process data according to Ukrainian law.
TERMS.SECTION_7_TEXT: We use cookies to improve the website.
TERMS.SECTION_8_TEXT: We may update terms at any time.
